headline: Brownfield doc reconcile hard-gate plus project MCP publishing
highlights: Brownfield /doc_reconcile is now enforced across /develop, /quick_fix, /refactor-planning, verify, CI, bootstrap, and guidance layers.
Bundled MCP servers from .agents/mcp/mcp.json are now published automatically into project-root .mcp.json.
Playwright and drawio are treated as core MCP servers; figma remains optional and key-gated.
OTA/update flow now surfaces release highlights and onboarding suggestions after upgrade.
post_update_steps: Run /init_brain after /update_brain to reload rules, MCP registration, and skill routing.
Open project-root .mcp.json and fill FIGMA_ACCESS_TOKEN only if you want Figma MCP.
Approve new MCP servers in your client the first time they are offered.
Use /doc_reconcile before changing behavior on brownfield projects with missing or stale docs.
onboarding_prompts: Try qa-simulator or Playwright-backed flows now that project MCP config is published.
Review README and USAGE_GUIDE sections for MCP provisioning and brownfield hard-gate behavior.
